home.title: HaoHan SMP
home.desc2: HaoHan SMP is a vanilla server supporting both Java and Bedrock platforms, created by Ginn

about.title: About Us
about.desc: HaoHan SMP is a Minecraft server community created by Ginn. You can join the server to play with friends, participate in events, and explore the Minecraft world together! Everything is free and everyone is welcome.

servers.title: Our Servers
servers.survival_desc: Java 1.17.1 and Bedrock 1.17.x for players who love survival, building, and long-term roleplay.
servers.bedrock_desc: A unified Java and Bedrock community, easy to connect with friends and build your own base.
servers.community_desc: Register, Q&A, report bugs, and get server updates through our official Discord server.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Explore the world of HaoHan SMP through memorable moments.
gallery.intro: Welcome to our gallery! This page contains albums and memorable images from HaoHan SMP. Click any image to view a full size version.

items.text: 1.1. No hacking/cheating for any reason.
items.sub: If you suspect someone is hacking/cheating, please report it to an admin.

items.text: 1.2. No stealing/griefing other players' bases.
items.sub: If you enter someone's base or team area, do not loot or destroy anything, whether or not anyone is there.

items.text: 1.3. No random killing without reason.
1.4. Protect and maintain spawn.
items.sub: Spawn is shared by everyone. If a creeper blows a hole, please fill it back. Community builds by players or admins for events must not be looted.

items.text: 1.5. Follow Minecraft EULA.
1.6. Respect each other in the SMP.
2.1. Allowed clients/mods:
items.sub: Clients: Vanilla, Optifine, Fabric, Forge. Mods: Schematica, Litematica, Freelook, Autofish. Note: Using these features through a hack client is considered hacking.

items.text: 2.2. Disallowed clients/mods:
If you lost items without clear cause / your pets were killed for no reason / your base was griefed...
items.sub: You can report to admin by creating a ticket (🎫┋create-ticket) to get it resolved.

items.text: No NSFW/18+ content, bot abuse, spam, or advertising links in 💬┋chat.
Respect each other, no insults or hate speech.
No discussion of politics or religion.
Follow Discord TOS.
1.1. Hacking/cheating:
items.sub: 1st offense: IP-Ban 3 days · 2nd offense: IP-Ban 30 days · 3rd offense: Permanent IP-Ban.

items.text: 1.2. Lack of common sense:
items.sub: 1st offense: Warning · 2nd offense: Warning · 3rd offense: IP-Ban 3 days · 4th offense: Permanent IP-Ban.

items.text: Handled based on severity of violation.
The criminal code may be updated at any time.
Acknowledging your mistake and accepting correction will reduce punishment.
If you're wrong, don't try to deny it — it won't help you.
By playing on the SMP, you have read, understood, and agreed to the HaoHan Criminal Code.
And one thing — if you play legit and are friendly, you don't even need to read any of this.

smpinfo.title: SMP Info
smpinfo.desc: Everything you need to know about HaoHan SMP.
smpinfo.q1: What are the server specs, and is it enough to handle an SMP?
smpinfo.a1: The server currently uses an Intel Xeon Platinum 8124M @ 3.00GHz CPU, which is enough to maintain a stable 20 TPS for up to 15 players. With 8GB of RAM, it can handle 20-25 players smoothly at around 19 TPS.
smpinfo.a2: The server auto-backups every 2 hours, so you don't need to worry about losing your items or the world.
smpinfo.q3: How do I join the server?
smpinfo.a3: Answer the questions in the Sign Up section, then join the Discord to see the IP.
smpinfo.q4: How can I donate to the server?
smpinfo.a4: You can contact Ginn#2005 directly via MoMo, PayPal, or Cards.
smpinfo.q5: Why can't I join the server even after signing up?
smpinfo.a5: It's either because the mods haven't read your application yet, or your application was rejected!

f1.name: Explore the world
f1.desc: Discover a vast Minecraft world, mine resources and build your base.

f2.name: Survive and thrive
f2.desc: Survive with friends, fight monsters, and connect with other players.

f3.name: Discover wildlife
f3.desc: Meet new creatures, tame and nurture pets in your own world.

f4.name: Custom mechanics
f4.desc: Experience unique custom features, rank systems, and much more.

f5.name: Get our modpack
f5.desc: Download our custom modpack, including shaders and additional mods.

f6.name: Learn more
f6.desc: Explore server guides, history, and the latest updates.

faq.q1: What are the server specs, and is it enough to handle an SMP?
faq.a1: The server currently uses an Intel Xeon Platinum 8124M @ 3.00GHz CPU, which is enough to maintain a stable 20 TPS for up to 15 players. With 8GB of RAM, it can handle 20-25 players smoothly at around 19 TPS.
faq.a2: The server auto-backups every 2 hours, so you don't need to worry about losing your items or the world.
faq.q3: How do I join the server?
faq.a3: Register an account on the website, then join the Discord to receive updates.
faq.q4: How can I donate to the server?
faq.a4: You can visit the Donate page or contact Ginn#2005 directly to support the server.
faq.q5: Why can't I join the server even after signing up?
faq.a5: Registration requests require validation time by the system, or your account was not properly linked!

sub_rules:
1.1. No hacking/cheating under any circumstances.
• If you suspect anyone of hacking/cheating, report it to the admin.

1.2. No stealing/griefing others' bases.
• If you enter someone's base or team territory, you must not steal or destroy anything, whether they are online or not.

1.4. Preserve and protect the spawn area.
• Spawn belongs to everyone, please preserve it: if a creeper blows up a hole, don't be lazy and fill it up; :CatHeart:
• Community builds made by players or admins for events must not be stolen from.
1.6. Respect each other in the SMP.

If your items disappear, pets are killed without reason, or your base is griefed,...
=> You can: Report it to the admin by opening a ticket (HaoHan SMP [Comeback Soon] 🎫┋create-ticket) to get it resolved.

discord.title: II. Discord
rules_list: No NSFW/18+, bot usage, spam, or promotional links in HaoHan SMP [Comeback Soon] 💬┋chat;
Respect each other, no mutual insults or hostility;
No discussions on political or religious topics;

penalty.title: III. Penalties
discord_rules: Handled according to severity of the violation.

footer_msg.title: IV. Final Notes
msgs: The criminal code may be updated at any time;
Admitting mistakes and accepting correction will reduce the penalty;
If you are wrong, do not try to deny it, as it will not help you;
By playing on the SMP, you confirm you have read, understood, and agreed to the HaoHan Criminal Code.
And one more thing: if you play legit and friendly, you don't even need to read this.

home_labels.title: Welcome to HaoHan SMP
home_labels.desc: A community-run Minecraft survival server offering a focused co-op, roleplay and long-term survival experience.
home_labels.servers_subtitle: Pick your platform and start your survival journey with the community.
home_labels.features_subtitle: An elevated Minecraft survival experience with exclusive features built for adventure.
home_labels.faq_subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about our server and how to join.
home_labels.faq_more_prefix: Still have questions? Ask them on our
home_labels.rules_hero_desc: Please read and follow the rules below to keep the community friendly and fair.
home_labels.rules_ticket_desc: You can contact admins by opening a ticket for support.

wiki.title: Server Guide - Wiki
wiki.section1_desc: The server supports both Java Edition and Bedrock Edition. You can connect using IP: haohansmp.hopto.org (Java default port: 25565, Bedrock port: 19132).
wiki.section2_desc: When entering the server for the first time, type /register <password> <confirm_password> to create your game account. For subsequent plays, use /login <password>.
wiki.section3_desc: Register an account on the web with the exact same in-game name to manage your profile, donate, and sync roles from LuckPerms.
wiki.section4_desc: Donating through our automated system helps maintain the server. All contributions receive custom benefits and rewards.

wiki_content.hero_desc: Core gameplay mechanics and survival guidelines for newcomers.
wiki_content.intro_desc: Based on the spirit of an expanded Survival SMP, the world features uniquely customized terrain and new mechanics waiting for you to discover.
wiki_content.intro_rules_note: Make sure to read and follow the {rules_link} before joining, and connect with {discord_link} for the fastest support from our Staff team.
wiki_content.intro_quickstart_desc: Learn the first steps to survive and progress.
wiki_content.intro_modpack_desc: Download and install the official modpack for the optimal gameplay experience.
wiki_content.recipes_desc: A system of special crafting recipes (Custom Crafting Recipes) using rare materials collected from the Abyss world:
wiki_content.recipes_item1_desc: Use rare fish caught from deep waters to cook gourmet dishes that grant powerful stat buffs like Speed, Fire Resistance, and extended Regeneration.
wiki_content.recipes_item2_desc: Integrated recipes to optimize raw ores, gold blocks, and ancient upgrade templates found in dungeon treasure chests to forge high-end survival gear.
wiki_content.mobs_notice: The exclusive creature system and dungeon boss guardians (Mythic Mobs) are under development and will be updated in detail by admins as soon as possible.
wiki_content.villagers_desc: A complete overhaul of Librarian Villager trading logic to balance the game and prevent players from obtaining overpowered gear too early:
wiki_content.villagers_item1_desc: Level 1 (Novice) villagers will never offer top-tier books like Mending or Unbreaking 3 when players reset their profession.
wiki_content.villagers_item2_desc: Players must trade consistently to level up villagers to higher tiers (Apprentice, Journeyman, Expert, Master) to unlock premium enchantment books.
wiki_content.villagers_item3_desc: Certain special enchantment books are restricted by biome, only appearing from villagers in specific biomes like swamps or deserts.
wiki_content.fishing_desc: Transforming the boring default fishing into a deep, challenging, and highly rewarding entertainment feature:
wiki_content.fishing_item1_desc: When a fish bites, a pressure bar appears on screen. You must click and release skillfully to keep the bar in the safe zone to successfully reel in the fish.
wiki_content.fishing_item2_desc: The type of fish you catch depends entirely on your geographic location (river, deep sea, swamp, Nether) and weather conditions (rain, nighttime).
wiki_content.fishing_item3_desc: Each caught creature has completely random weight and size, and is clearly classified by rarity: Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary.
wiki_content.items_desc: A list of exclusive items with custom textures and unique abilities, only obtainable through dangerous exploration:
wiki_content.items_item1_desc: Items with exclusive combat skill effects, only dropped by defeating Boss guardians or hunting Nether structures and deep dark dungeons.
wiki_content.items_item2_desc: Mythical armor sets and ultra-fast mining tools found in ancient floating castles on distant End islands.
wiki_content.items_item3_desc: Dozens of fish with unique appearances (demon-eyed salmon, glowing squid...) and special drinks purchased at Taverns for powerful temporary stat boosts.
wiki_content.items_item4_desc: Dropped as collectible display items with the exact skin of the defeated player during PvP combat activities on the server.
wiki_content.guilds_desc: A system that allows players to bond, form teams, and build exclusive impenetrable bases:
wiki_content.guilds_item1_desc: Players can create their own Guild, invite teammates, assign clear management ranks, and own a fully secure internal chat channel.
wiki_content.guilds_item2_desc: Guild leaders can use resources or contribution points to purchase land ownership, protecting bases from griefing, theft, or intrusion by non-guild players.
wiki_content.guilds_item3_desc: Work together on exploration activities and contribute resources to level up the guild. Each unlocked Guild level grants permanent buff effects (such as increased max health, mining efficiency, or fishing luck) for all members.
wiki_content.guide_world_item1_desc: Mountain height limits and underground cave depths are significantly expanded. Hundreds of new biomes added (ice caves, volcanic valleys; 8 new Nether regions; vibrant nebula skies in the End).
wiki_content.guide_world_item2_desc: All default villages are transformed into fortified towns with surrounding walls. Building styles and materials of villages/pillager outposts automatically sync with the surrounding environment.
wiki_content.guide_world_item3_desc: Mine shafts, ruined portals, and ocean monuments are massively expanded. Temples are now complex labyrinths with sophisticated traps and mutant monsters guarding treasure chests (chests with higher resource and upgrade template drop rates).
wiki_content.guide_world_item4_desc: Tall watchtowers appear as terrain landmarks, and Taverns serve as absolutely safe zones where you can rent rooms and trade with NPC merchants along your journey.
wiki_content.guide_qol_item1_desc: Ghast fireballs in the Nether still deal damage to players but do not destroy blocks at all, keeping your builds safe.
wiki_content.guide_qol_item2_desc: Use an intuitive book interface to freely adjust poses, add arms, resize, or hide armor stands for home decoration.
wiki_content.guide_qol_item3_desc: When you chop all the wood from a tree trunk, all surrounding leaves will automatically vanish instantly to save time and minimize regional lag.

explore.title: Explore the World
explore.desc: Embark on an adventure through an endless survival world. You will discover unique and grand structures, community builds, and archaeological ruins containing rare treasures.

survival.title: Survival & Progress
survival.desc: Deep survival mechanics requiring cooperation and resource trading among players. Build secure bases, establish automated farms, and make your mark in a dynamic economy.

terrain.title: Customizable Terrain
terrain.desc: A unique terrain generation system, bringing majestic mountains, romantic valleys, and artistically enhanced biomes for you to build your dream creations.

custom.title: Custom Mechanics
custom.desc: Special features exclusive to HaoHan SMP: rich quest system, unique custom fishing, smarter monsters, upgraded villager trades, and special crafting recipes.

modpack.title: Get Modpack
modpack.desc: Our custom modpack optimizes performance, integrates beautiful Shader packs, immersive 3D surround sound, and helpful quality-of-life (QoL) features for the smoothest experience.

more.title: Learn More
more.desc: Join our Discord community to connect with thousands of other players, check server changelogs, discuss, and contribute to making our server even better.
